column1: The whale is the _____ creature in the world. (big)
The mosquito is one of the _____ insects. (dangerous)
Tornadoes can pick up objects as _____ as automobiles. (heavy)
For Spartans, bravery was _____ than anything else. (important)
The results are _____ than we have expected. (bad)
The mouse ran into _____ hole to protect _____ . (it, it)
